Epic Games have made more updates to #Fortnite Reload 📝 

- Tactical Assault Rifle and Iron Pump Shotgun unvaulted
- Combat Shotgun vaulted
- Ranger, Combat Assault Rifle, O.X.R. Rifle, and Twin Mag SMG vaulted in Ranked
- Charge Shotgun and Dual Pistols vaulted in Slurp Rush
